text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Awww yeah! It's here, it's here! Today's the day!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
We've got the aspiring world champ, El Condor
Pasa, the Otherworldly Front-Runner, Silence
Suzuka, and the Beast's Successor, Grass Wonder!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You're delusional if you don't believe this is the
race of the century! I better not blink!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Spe! Come here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh... Maruzen! You came!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Of course! How could I miss a rad race like this?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Right, Rudolf? ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So, you're here as well, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa whoa! Y-you too, P-President?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, Maruzensky has managed to keep an
extra seat empty.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You should come join us. The view is wonderful
from here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I... um... well...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, Spe. Don't hold out on us. Get on over
here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're going to want to remember this race.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Guaranteed. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, very much so.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My resurrection from burnt ash is complete. All
that remains is to spread my wings and fly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll soar past the Otherworldly Front-Runner and
the Phantom Bird, all the way to the top.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I am Grass Wonder, the Phoenix—nothing can
hold me back!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass! I've been waitin'!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hello, El.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... What happened to your usual battle cry?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Don't need words anymore, not here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Everything's on the line! So don't hold back!
